info.title: TEA Publisher API Profile
info.summary: Draft HTTP profile aligned with the canonical TEA publisher protobuf contract
info.description: This OpenAPI profile mirrors the google.api.http annotations in proto/tea/v1/publisher.proto. The protobuf contract remains the canonical source of truth for publisher RPC semantics. Optional publisher capabilities that a given implementation does not support must fail explicitly rather than partially succeeding.

servers.description: Local development base URL; publisher paths are rooted under /v1/publisher.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Publisher operations for product metadata and releases.

tags.name: Product Releases
tags.description: Publisher operations for product release lifecycle management.

tags.name: Component Releases
tags.description: Publisher operations for component release lifecycle management.

tags.name: Artifacts
tags.description: Publisher operations for immutable artifact registration and deletion.

tags.name: Collections
tags.description: Publisher operations for versioned artifact collections.

post.description: Create a product record. Client-supplied UUIDs may be preserved when provided.

put.description: Apply only the fields listed in updateMask and preserve all unspecified fields.

delete.description: Delete a product. When cascade=false, implementations should reject deletion if dependent product releases still exist.

200.description: Deletion result including cascade side effects.

post.description: Create a product release linked to an existing product when productUuid is supplied.

put.description: Apply only the fields listed in updateMask and preserve all unspecified fields.

200.description: Deletion result for the addressed product release.

put.description: Apply only the fields listed in updateMask and preserve all unspecified fields.

delete.description: Delete a component. When cascade=false, implementations should reject deletion if dependent releases still exist.

200.description: Deletion result including any cascaded component release deletions.

post.description: Create a component release linked to an existing component.

put.description: Apply only the fields listed in updateMask. Implementations must not allow preRelease to move from false back to true.

200.description: Deletion result for the addressed component release.

post.description: Client-streaming artifact upload. The first frame carries metadata; subsequent frames carry content bytes. This remains intentionally unsupported in the current reference server.

requestBody.description: Documentation-only HTTP framing for the client-streaming UploadArtifact RPC.

post.summary: Register an artifact from a source URL
post.description: Fetch immutable content from a source URL, verify declared checksums, and register the artifact metadata. Implementations may reject non-HTTPS or private-network URLs.

delete.description: Delete an artifact only when it is not referenced, unless the implementation explicitly supports safe force-delete semantics.

200.description: Deletion result for the addressed artifact.

post.description: Create version 1 of a logical collection stream. All referenced artifacts must already exist.

post.summary: Create a new immutable collection version
post.description: Create the next immutable version of an existing collection. Prior versions remain addressable.
Sign one collection version and return the updated metadata. This remains intentionally unsupported in the current reference server until a real signing and storage flow exists.
Advanced optional client-streaming batch upload capability. This remains intentionally unsupported in the current reference server.

requestBody.description: Documentation-only HTTP framing for the client-streaming BatchUploadArtifacts RPC.

post.description: Advanced optional client-streaming migration capability for importing collections plus artifact data. This remains intentionally unsupported in the current reference server.

requestBody.description: Documentation-only HTTP framing for the client-streaming ImportCollection RPC.

bearerAuth.description: All publisher operations require authentication; deployments define the exact JWT issuer, audience, and write scope vocabulary.

UuidPath.name: uuid
UuidPath.description: UUID of the addressed TEA resource.

CascadeQuery.name: cascade
CascadeQuery.description: Whether dependent releases should also be deleted.

ForceQuery.name: force
ForceQuery.description: Whether deletion should proceed even if the artifact is referenced. Implementations may reject this flag when safe cleanup is not supported.

FieldMask.description: Protobuf FieldMask JSON encoding: a comma-separated list of lowerCamel field paths.

Distribution.description: A delivery-specific variant of a component release.

ComponentRef.description: Reference to a component, optionally pinned to a specific component release.

Product.description: Canonical product resource defined in proto/tea/v1/product.proto.

example.name: Apache Log4j 2
example.description: Java logging framework product line maintained by Apache.

Component.description: Canonical component resource defined in proto/tea/v1/component.proto.

ArtifactMetadata.description: Artifact metadata used for upload or URL-backed registration.

Artifact.description: Canonical artifact resource defined in proto/tea/v1/artifact.proto.

UpdateReason.description: Why a new collection version exists.

Collection.description: Canonical collection resource defined in proto/tea/v1/collection.proto.

updateReason.comment: Add VEX alongside the original SBOM.

example.name: Apache Log4j 2
example.description: Java logging framework product line maintained by Apache.

UpdateProductBody.description: Body fields for UpdateProduct. The resource UUID is carried in the path and maps to the protobuf uuid field.

example.description: Java logging framework product line with maintained transparency metadata.

UpdateProductReleaseBody.description: Body fields for UpdateProductRelease. Unspecified fields must be preserved.

UpdateComponentBody.description: Body fields for UpdateComponent. The path UUID maps to the protobuf uuid field.

example.description: Core logging library component with transparency metadata.

UpdateComponentReleaseBody.description: Body fields for UpdateComponentRelease. Implementations must not allow preRelease to move from false back to true.

oneOf.description: Subsequent frames: artifact content chunks encoded as base64.

UploadArtifactFrame.description: Client-streaming upload frame. Metadata must be sent before any content chunks.

UpdateCollectionBody.description: Body fields for UpdateCollection. The path UUID maps to the protobuf uuid field and creates a new immutable collection version.

updateReason.comment: Add VEX alongside the original SBOM.

SignCollectionBody.description: Signing parameters for one collection version.

oneOf.description: Artifact payload frame with embedded content.

InvalidRequest.description: The request was malformed, failed validation, or violated a canonical publisher rule.

Unauthenticated.description: Authentication is required for every publisher operation.

NotFound.description: The addressed publisher resource does not exist.

FailedPrecondition.description: The request was rejected because referential integrity or explicit cascade policy requirements were not met.

InvalidContent.description: The request payload or fetched content failed checksum or semantic verification.

UpstreamFetchFailed.description: The server could not safely fetch or verify the requested upstream artifact content.

UnsupportedCapability.description: This optional publisher capability remains intentionally unsupported in the current reference implementation and must fail explicitly.

deleteComponentResponse.summary: Deleted component with cascaded release cleanup

uploadArtifactMetadataFrame.summary: First upload frame containing artifact metadata

uploadArtifactContentFrame.summary: Subsequent upload frame containing content bytes

createArtifactFromUrlRequest.summary: Register a CycloneDX SBOM from an immutable URL

deleteArtifactResponse.summary: Deleted artifact that was not referenced

createCollectionRequest.summary: Create version 1 of a component release collection
